---
title: "Excel Course Material"
description: "Downloadable PDF and Excel files."
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
page-layout: full
---

::: {.content-block}
:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="45%"}
<div style="min-height: 120px;">
### Guide: Template
Subtitle for Guide
</div>

::: {.card .shadow-sm .p-3 .h-100}
![File Preview](../files/Excel_Grundlagen_preview.jpg){.border .rounded .mb-3}

<div class="mt-auto">
[Download File](../files/Excel_Grundlagen.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary .w-100 role="button" target="_blank"}
</div>
:::
:::

::: {.column width="10%"}
:::

::: {.column width="45%"}
<div style="min-height: 120px;">
### Technical Setup
Subtitle for technical Setup with longer text to test alignment
</div>

::: {.card .shadow-sm .p-3 .h-100}
![File Preview](../files/Excel_Aufgaben_preview.jpg){.border .rounded .mb-3}
    
<div class="mt-auto">
[Download File](../files/Excel_Aufgaben.xlsx){.btn .btn-outline-primary .w-100 role="button" target="_blank"}
</div>
:::
:::

::::

<br>

::: {.card .text-center .p-3 .mb-4 .bg-light}
**Example Project**
<div class="mt-2">
  [View on GitHub <i class="bi bi-github"></i>](https://github.com/dein-repo){.btn .btn-dark .px-4 role="button" target="_blank"}
</div>
:::
:::
